<!--
Thanks for contributing! Tick the boxes that apply.
Read CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't — the curation bar is specific.
-->

## Change type
- [ ] New node
- [ ] New resource on an existing node
- [ ] Edit to an existing node (summary / rubric / dependencies)
- [ ] Tooling / site / docs
- [ ] Link rot fix
- [ ] Other (describe)

## What changed
<!-- One short paragraph. -->

## For new resources / nodes (check all that apply)
- [ ] The verification link resolves (I clicked it)
- [ ] The "why this one" annotation is specific (not "good intro")
- [ ] Durable-vs-current flag is set correctly
- [ ] `difficulty` and `cost` are set
- [ ] `python tools/validate_data.py` passes locally
- [ ] `python tools/linkcheck.py --paths roadmap-data/<area>.yml` passes for changed entries

## For tooling / site / docs
- [ ] `tsc` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No source file exceeds 500 lines

## Related issue
<!-- e.g. closes #123 -->
